## Description

<!-- A brief description of what this PR does. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Blueprint submission (new automation blueprint)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/abmlib/automation-blueprints-marketplace/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes build successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] My changes pass all tests (`npm test`)
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Blueprint Contributor Agreement](https://github.com/abmlib/automation-blueprints-marketplace/blob/main/BLUEPRINT_CONTRIBUTOR_AGREEMENT.md) (for blueprint submissions)

## Blueprint Submissions Only

- [ ] Blueprint passes `validateDsl()` validation
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, secrets, or PII
- [ ] Added to the appropriate `examples/blueprints/` subdirectory
- [ ] Updated the directory README with a description
